title: piper lineatum var. lineatum
intro: Piper lineatum var. lineatum, also known as the Indian long pepper, is a flowering plant in the family Piperaceae, native to the tropical forests of India and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Piper lineatum var. lineatum include decoctions, infusions, and powdered extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
